item.title: Open to work no more: Mendoza celebrates with a LinkedIn post after taken at No. 1
item.description: The new Las Vegas Raiders quarterback is frequently active on the platform and has posted about multiple career milestones.

item.title: Drafted in drip: Looking at the best outfits from the 2026 NFL draft
item.description: The stars stepped out in their best suits ahead of hearing their names called in the 2026 NFL draft.

item.title: 👀 NFL draft trade grades: Assessing Round 1 swaps
item.description: We're grading the most impactful trades of the 2026 NFL draft, including three deals by the Bills.

item.title: Rams take Simpson, note 'this is Matthew's team'
item.description: The Rams selected quarterback Ty Simpson with the 13th pick in the NFL draft, though coach Sean McVay made it clear: "This is Matthew's team."

item.title: Shiver: U-M didn't protect me enough from Moore
item.description: Former Michigan football staffer Paige Shiver characterized her relationship with Sherrone Moore as an "open secret" within the athletic department an...
